meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Advanced Checklist for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client projects. Master AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster, fix bugs instantly, and scale your freelance dev business.
content.answer_block: To overcome project paralysis, integrate an AI-first debugging loop. Use Claude Code for deep context analysis and Antigravity for automated refactoring. By shifting from manual investigation to AI-orchestrated diagnostic patterns, you reduce mean-time-to-resolution by 70%, allowing you to close tickets and ship client features with relentless consistency.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks in the void, a rhythmic reminder of a feature that should have been finished two days ago. You’re trapped in the '90% done' syndrome, buried under a mountain of edge-case bugs and mounting client anxiety. The code feels heavy, the architecture opaque, and your momentum has stalled. 

But the era of manual debugging is over. By weaponizing AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform the debugging process from a grueling slog into a high-velocity engineering workflow. This checklist is your blueprint for reclaiming your time, clearing your backlog, and regaining your reputation as a developer who delivers.

steps.title: Contextualize the Failure
steps.description: Before fixing, map the failure state. Use AI to ingest logs and trace the execution path to identify the exact point of divergence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided error trace and project structure. Map the failure to the specific module causing the state inconsistency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze logs in ./logs/error.log and map to source files'

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a diff analysis between the last known stable state and the current broken implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a causal analysis on the recent git diff. Identify which change introduced the regression.

steps.title: Isolate and Mock Dependencies
steps.description: Stop debugging live external APIs. Isolate the broken function by generating local mocks to verify logic independently.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a unit test suite that isolates this logic and mocks the external API response.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate mock tests for the failing function in ./src/services/data.ts'

steps.title: AI-Assisted Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix using structural refactoring rather than patching. Ensure the code adheres to your project's established design patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified module to resolve the bug while improving type safety and adhering to SOLID principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'refactor the module to fix the bug and improve type safety'

steps.title: Regression Validation
steps.description: Finalize by running a full suite of automated regression tests to ensure the fix hasn't introduced downstream side effects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current test coverage and suggest additional edge cases to prevent future regressions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm test && report any coverage gaps'

pro_tips: Always feed the 'package.json' and 'tsconfig.json' as global context to Claude Code to prevent hallucinated dependency suggestions.
Use Antigravity's 'dry-run' mode on complex refactors to preview architectural changes before applying them to your codebase.
Keep a 'debug-log.md' file where you dump AI insights; this creates a knowledge base for future client projects.
If the AI gets stuck, force a 'Thinking' step by asking it to explain the state machine of the current function before suggesting a fix.
Normalize your error outputs across all projects so your AI agents can recognize patterns faster.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current three most difficult open tickets. Apply these five steps to each, tracking your time saved compared to manual debugging.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the framework to move from 'stuck' to 'shipped' in record time. Stop letting bugs dictate your freelance schedule and take control of your development velocity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
